chemaxon.alchemist.configbuilder

Class ConfigElementFactory

  • java.lang.Object
    • chemaxon.alchemist.configbuilder.ConfigElementFactory
  • Deprecated. 
    This class is no longer part of the public API, not maintained and will be removed after 6.0 This class is responsible for creating config item objects defined by configuration xml, and bundle file

    public class ConfigElementFactory
extends Object
    Version:
    5.4.2
    Author:
    Istvan Rabel, Attila Szabo

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ConfigElementFactory(chemaxon.alchemist.configbuilder.configuration.marshalling.Configuration configuration)
      Deprecated. 
      Creates a ConfigElementFactory based on Configuration
      ConfigElementFactory(chemaxon.alchemist.configbuilder.configuration.marshalling.Configuration configuration, chemaxon.alchemist.configbuilder.LicenseSupport licenseSupport)
      Deprecated. 
      Creates a ConfigElementFactory based on Configuration
      ConfigElementFactory(String configPath)
      Deprecated. 
      Creates a ConfigElementFactory based on configPath
      ConfigElementFactory(String configPath, chemaxon.alchemist.configbuilder.LicenseSupport licenseSupport)
      Deprecated. 
      Creates a ConfigElementFactory based on configPath

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ConfigElement create(Class<?> configElementClass)
      Deprecated. 
      Creates an instance of configElementClass class.
      Note: BasicConfigElement can not be created this way, since it can be represented in many ways
      ConfigElement create(chemaxon.alchemist.configbuilder.configuration.marshalling.Element xmlElement)
      Deprecated. 
      Creates ConfigElement instance based on bundle informations
      ConfigElement create(String configElementId)
      Deprecated. 
      Creates an instace of class extending ConfigElement and identified by configElementId in configuration XML

    • Constructor Detail

      • ConfigElementFactory

        public ConfigElementFactory(String configPath)
        Deprecated. 
        Creates a ConfigElementFactory based on configPath
        Parameters:
        configPath - is the path to configuration xml file of elements

      • ConfigElementFactory

        public ConfigElementFactory(String configPath,
                    chemaxon.alchemist.configbuilder.LicenseSupport licenseSupport)
        Deprecated. 
        Creates a ConfigElementFactory based on configPath
        Parameters:
        configPath - is the path to configuration xml file of elements
        licenseSupport - is the license support to be used
        Since:
        5.5

      • ConfigElementFactory

        public ConfigElementFactory(chemaxon.alchemist.configbuilder.configuration.marshalling.Configuration configuration)
                     throws IllegalArgumentException
        Deprecated. 
        Creates a ConfigElementFactory based on Configuration
        Parameters:
        configuration - is the configuration of elements
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - when any problem occurred during configuration load

      • ConfigElementFactory

        public ConfigElementFactory(chemaxon.alchemist.configbuilder.configuration.marshalling.Configuration configuration,
                    chemaxon.alchemist.configbuilder.LicenseSupport licenseSupport)
                     throws IllegalArgumentException
        Deprecated. 
        Creates a ConfigElementFactory based on Configuration
        Parameters:
        configuration - is the configuration of elements
        licenseSupport - is the license support to be used
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - when any problem occurred during configuration load
        Since:
        5.5

    • Method Detail

      • create

        public ConfigElement create(String configElementId)
                     throws IllegalArgumentException
        Deprecated. 
        Creates an instace of class extending ConfigElement and identified by configElementId in configuration XML
        Parameters:
        configElementId - is the id of config element
        Returns:
        the ConfigElement instance
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - when any problem occurred during configuration load

      • create

        public ConfigElement create(Class<?> configElementClass)
                     throws IllegalArgumentException
        Deprecated. 
        Creates an instance of configElementClass class.
        Note: BasicConfigElement can not be created this way, since it can be represented in many ways
        Parameters:
        configElementClass - is the class of the ConfigElement inheritance to be created
        Returns:
        a new configElementClass class instance
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - when configElementClass is invalid and thus XML item can not be created from it

      • create

        public ConfigElement create(chemaxon.alchemist.configbuilder.configuration.marshalling.Element xmlElement)
                     throws IllegalArgumentException
        Deprecated. 
        Creates ConfigElement instance based on bundle informations
        Parameters:
        xmlElement - is the xml data that new ConfigElement is based on
        Returns:
        the ConfigElement instance
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - when configElementClass is invalid and thus XML item can not be created from it
